SEARCH
Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.specialrewards.votemilestones

Class VoteMilestoneLimit

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.specialrewards.votemilestones.VoteMilestoneLimit
public final class VoteMilestoneLimit extends Object
Per-milestone retrigger limiter. Stored data is lastTriggeredMs (epoch millis).

    Limit types for milestone retriggering.

    • VoteMilestoneLimit

      public VoteMilestoneLimit(VoteMilestoneLimit.Type type, long cooldownMillis)
      Constructs a new VoteMilestoneLimit.
      Parameters:
      type - limit type
      cooldownMillis - cooldown duration in milliseconds

  • Method Details

    • none

      public static VoteMilestoneLimit none()
      Creates a VoteMilestoneLimit with no restrictions.
      Returns:
      limit with NONE type

    • getType

      public VoteMilestoneLimit.Type getType()
      Gets the limit type.
      Returns:
      limit type

    • getCooldownMillis

      public long getCooldownMillis()
      Gets the cooldown duration in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      cooldown milliseconds

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Checks if the limit is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if limit is enabled

    • fromConfig

      public static VoteMilestoneLimit fromConfig(org.bukkit.configuration.ConfigurationSection milestoneSection)
      Parses a VoteMilestoneLimit from configuration.
      Parameters:
      milestoneSection - milestone configuration section
      Returns:
      parsed limit or none()

    • allows

      public boolean allows(long lastTriggeredMs, long nowMs, ZoneId zone)
      Checks if the limit allows retriggering at the given time.
      Parameters:
      lastTriggeredMs - last triggered time in milliseconds
      nowMs - current time in milliseconds
      zone - time zone for window calculations
      Returns:
      true if retriggering is allowed

    • nextAllowedMs

      public long nextAllowedMs(long lastTriggeredMs)
      Calculates the next allowed trigger time in milliseconds.
      Parameters:
      lastTriggeredMs - last triggered time in milliseconds
      Returns:
      next allowed time or 0 if not applicable
